tool.name: index_align_bulk_rna_seq
tool.description: Bulk RNA-Seq analysis. Measures average gene expression across a cell population.
tool.command: mkdir -p /genome /scratch && #for $element in $genome_collection: ln -s '$element' "/genome/${element.element_identifier}" && #end for #for $element in $scratch_collection: ln -s '$element' "/scratch/${element.element_identifier}" && #end for /home/index_align.sh > '$output_log' 2>&1 && tar -chzf genome_archive.tar.gz -C /genome . && tar -chzf scratch_archive.tar.gz -C /scratch . && true
